title: 100pc White Plastic Cable Ties, 3 Different Sized Tie Wraps, Durable Strong Plastic Material Ensuring Longevity, Self Locking Zip Ties Ideal for Home, Office, Garden and DIY (White)
features: These cable ties are simple to use and require no special tools or expertise. Simply loop the cable tie around your cords or cables, and pull the end of the tie through the head of the tie to tighten and secure it in place

The cable ties are made from strong and durable plastic material, ensuring that they can withstand regular use and hold up well over time. Whether you need to secure cords in the garage or bundle cords in the office, these cable ties are sure to get the job done and last for a long time

The ties come in 3 different lengths - 10cm (3.93"), 15cm (5.90") & 20cm (7.87"). The 100-piece set of cable ties is great for use in a variety of settings, including homes, offices, and gardens. The assortment of white ties can be used to secure cords, cables, and other items that need to be organized or bundled
The cable ties are white, discreet, and can be used both indoors and outdoors. Great for securing whatever you need in place whether it's in the garden, the garage, or inside the office.

The flexible tail of the cable tie and its ergonomic design allow for easy and smooth threading. Its internal teeth ensure an optimal fit for the cable tie without damaging the object to be held and the head guarantees high-tensile strength, ensuring strong tightening
description: This 100-piece assorted white cable tie set provides a practical and reliable solution for organising cables, securing items, and keeping spaces neat and clutter-free. Manufactured from durable, high-quality nylon plastic, these strong and flexible ties are designed for long-lasting performance and dependable hold. Their clean white finish offers a tidy, professional look, making them suitable for use in the home, office, workshop, garage, or garden. Perfect for managing computer cables, TV wires, extension leads, and networking cords, these versatile ties can also be used for bundling tools, securing garden netting, fastening signage, or organising storage items. The self-locking mechanism ensures a firm grip once fastened, while the smooth edges help prevent snagging or damage to cables and surfaces. This assorted pack includes three useful lengths to suit a variety of tasks: 10 cm (3.93"), 15 cm (5.90"), and 20 cm (7.87"). The range of sizes ensures you always have the right tie available, whether you need a compact fastener for small cable bundles or a longer tie for larger applications. Supplied in convenient, easy-to-store packaging, this set is ideal for keeping in drawers, toolboxes, or utility cupboards so you’re always prepared for quick repairs, organisation jobs, or DIY projects.
